title: Can't unroll generate for condition regression
body:
---


Author Name: **Steven Slatter** (@steven-slatter)
Original Redmine Issue: 830 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-10-14
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

The following for loop:

     module a();
     endmodule
         function integer cdiv(input integer x);
             begin
                 cdiv = 10;
             end
         endfunction
     module b();
         genvar j;
         generate
             for (j = 0; j < cdiv(10); j=j+1)
                 a I();
         endgenerate
     endmodule

works properly in version 3.853, but generates the following error in 3.864:

> Unsupported: Can't unroll generate for; no variable on rhs of condition

> For loop doesn't have genvar index, or is malformed

This error seems similar to Issue #392 and #814, but was previously being handled correctly in version 3.853.
